Key Takeaways
⚡ What this week tells us
01
IPL push hit a new season high. RR vs MI reached 0.69% CTR — surpassing last week's top (0.66%). Hinglish rivalry framing continues to be the most effective copy pattern.
02
Fitness topic pages don't convert. Be Fit had the lowest CR at 0.19%. Like education, health & fitness apps are considered installs — not casual browse-and-tap behavior.
03
IPL Fan Picks was the best topic page at 0.31% CR. Cricket-themed content aligns naturally with our users during IPL season — intent and content matched.

💬 Why Hinglish Works
Most users are from Tier 2–3 India — Hindi-English mix is their natural language. Phrases like "Aaj Hai Asli Battle" feel personal and urgent, not generic. It signals the message was written for them, directly lifting tap rate.
📄 Topic Pages — Weekly Campaigns
3 Active
🏏 IPL Fan Picks
✓ Best CR · 0.31%
IPL SeasonCricketWeekend
Match Day Essentials: JioHotstar, CREX, Cricket Guru, Zomato
Cricket Fun Games: Cricket League, Real Championship Cricket
Strong intent match — IPL is live and users are actively seeking cricket content. Cricbuzz offer banner + match-day app curation is a proven format.
✈️ Trip Ready
~ Mid CR · 0.23%
Summer HolidaysTravelFamily
Plan your trip: UTS, RailOne, Rapido, redBus
Book your hotel: MakeMyTrip, OYO, ixigo, Yatra
Moderate performance. Travel is an early-intent category — families are researching, not installing yet. Good timing ahead of May summer holidays.
💪 Be Fit
✗ Lowest CR · 0.19%
World Health Day 04.07Health & Fitness
Strong Body: Nike Training, cult.fit, Daily Yoga, adidas Running
Fuel Journey: Swiggy, Zomato, Eatr, Indian Food Recipes
CR dropped to 0.19% — lowest this period. Fitness apps require strong motivation and context, not casual browsing intent.
🔍 Root Cause
Health & fitness apps — like education — are not impulse installs. World Health Day is a low-engagement trigger for our audience. Users need personal motivation to install fitness apps, which a topic page cannot create alone.
A/B Test Results
A/B Test · Concluded
🔵 Result In
AI-Localized Home Banners vs Default Banners
Manual banners slightly underperformed default on CR — but the operational win is significant.
Banner Type
CR
AI Manual Banners
0.43%
Default Banners
0.46%
⚡ Ops Efficiency Win
~50 mins → ~10–15 mins 70–80% saved
Manual effort cut by training Claude AI to handle banner creation — a major ops win even if CR needs further tuning.
→ Next Steps to Lift CR
1. Enhance AI selection — align apps with trending keywords and expand trend sources
2. Add Smart Fillers — show evergreen top performers when trends are not available

Next Week Key Focus
A/B Test · In Progress
🟡 Ongoing
New Homepage Card Layout UI
Test is currently running — comparing updated homepage card design vs current layout. Data collection is ongoing, results expected to be concluded this week. Key signals being tracked: tap-through rate, app view depth, and total installs per session.
